name: Edgar Poe: Hidden Objects
short_description: Uncover secrets in a mysterious mansion inspired by Edgar Allan Poe’s The Fall of the House of Usher. Play as a curious detective in a hidden-object adventure filled with puzzles, surprises, and a story full of twists!
detailed_description:
🔍 Step into a Mystery Full of Secrets and Surprises! 🕯️

Do you enjoy solving puzzles and exploring spooky old mansions? This game invites you into the strange and unforgettable world of The Fall of the House of Usher, based on the classic story by Edgar Allan Poe. 🏰

You’ll play as a curious detective who stumbles into something way beyond the ordinary. What’s going on with Roderick Usher, and why is the house filled with such strange energy? It’s up to you to find out — one clue at a time.

Use your sharp eye and love for solving mysteries to search through dark, mysterious rooms, uncover hidden secrets, and put the pieces together before it's too late! 🧩

🕹️ Game Features

  • Explore beautiful, atmospheric locations with lots of hidden objects and clues

  • Play again and again – items and puzzles change to keep things fun

  • Enjoy unique 360° panoramic scenes that really pull you into the story

  • Experience a fresh take on Poe’s famous tale with added twists and surprises

  • Collect special rewards by completing scenes in different game modes

Whether you're a fan of hidden-object games, spooky stories, or just love a good mystery, this game offers a rich and enjoyable experience that keeps you thinking and guessing.

🗝️ Your journey into the heart of mystery begins now… Will you unlock the secrets of the House of Usher? 🌙

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Ukrainian, Czech, Japanese
